scripts.start:local: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=local expo start
scripts.start:dev: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=dev expo start
scripts.start:stg: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=stg expo start
scripts.start:prd: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=prd expo start
scripts.ios:local: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=local expo start --ios
scripts.android:local: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=local expo start --android
scripts.test:config: pnpm exec vitest run config/stages.test.ts config/index.test.ts
scripts.build:local: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=local npx eas-cli build --profile local --platform all
scripts.build:dev: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=dev npx eas-cli build --profile dev --platform all
scripts.build:stg: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=stg npx eas-cli build --profile stg --platform all
scripts.build:prd: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=prd npx eas-cli build --profile prd --platform all
scripts.submit:prd: pnpm run prepare:packages && APP_STAGE=prd npx eas-cli submit --profile prd --platform all
